Video.summary: Marketing executives Kristen and Dave bought their modest first home a few years ago and undertook the much-needed renovations themselves. They did a great job removing walls and installing a new kitchen but then ran out of steam. Now they need designer Samantha Pynn's expertise to pull their open concept kitchen/dining/living room together and turn it into the beautiful modern space that they had originally envisioned.
Video.title: Pure Design: Kristen & Dave's Main Floor

Image.alt: Pure Design: Kristen & Dave's Main Floor
Pure Design: Kristen & Dave's Main Floor

Video.summary: WAKANDA FOREVER!!! Today on My Froggy Stuff check out the One and Only Custom Disney Princess Black Panther Shuri Doll!! Loving techie!!

Video.summary: Have you always wanted to learn how to Sew? Well now's your chance to have a lesson in the comfort of your own home. This easy to follow step by step programme will teach you the basics to get strated and then move on to some simple projects such as making a lined tote bag to practise what you have learnt. You will find out what equipment you'll need, larn some brilliant tips to make beautiful creations including a patchwork cushion and elasticated skirt!
Video.title: Learn to Sew

Image.alt: Learn to Sew
Learn to Sew
